name: rtlsdrjs
description: Turn your Realtek RTL2832U based device into an SDR receiver using JavaScript
comment: Vendored copy. The native `usb` dependency was removed: in the browser the package.json `browser` field swaps lib/usb.js for lib/web-usb.js (WebUSB), so libusb is never used. `claimInterface`/`releaseInterface` params renamed off the reserved word `interface` for strict-mode ESM bundling.
author: Sandeep Mistry
